channel.title: Nail Art Ideas from vivarecipesinspo.github.io/nailart
channel.description: A collection of stunning nail art ideas and inspiration.

item.title: Creative Nails Acrylic Ideas Red
item.description: Don't know how to style your nails today? Try this gorgeous Nails Acrylic Ideas Red look and impress everyone. Click the link for more styling tips. #diynails #salonstyle #nailhacks #makeover #beauty
